old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11.2","title":"Persist lichend RPL identity state","description":"Implement a Linux NonVolatile backend with atomic durable replacement and old-value preservation on failure, then define lichend root identity and link-epoch load/provision lifecycle. Derive the root IPv6 IID/DODAG identity consistently from the persisted key and reject mismatched configured state.","acceptance_criteria":"Crash/failure tests prove durable DAO replay and TX state updates preserve the previous value on failed replacement; restart tests retain root identity and advance a safe link epoch; configured root address and persisted identity mismatches fail closed; three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-07-21T00:13:36.503329491Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T00:13:36.503329491Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-21T00:13:36.583026454Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: NonVolatile Linux FileStorage with atomic durable (fsync+rename) updates and failure preservation implemented; root identity/epoch load/provision from persisted seed+urandom, IID/DODAG derivation via Identity::from_seed, fail-closed on mismatch; crash/restart test added and passing; fmt/clippy/test/3 review passes; related persistence/RPL explored via parallel greps.
